# Hydra Collectables México

> The #1 Magic: The Gathering specialized store in Mexico.

## Metadata
- **URL**: https://hydracollect.com
- **Type**: E-commerce / TCG Marketplace
- **Focus**: MTG Singles, Sealed Product, Commander, Modern
- **Location**: Monterrey, NL, Mexico
- **Currency**: MXN

## Key Features
- Live inventory of 10,000+ Magic cards.
- Real-time market prices for the Mexican market.
- Fast shipping throughout the Mexican Republic.
- Specialized Search Engine for singles and specific printings.

## Structural Links
- [Marketplace](https://hydracollect.com/singles): Browse 10,000+ MTG singles.
- [Sell Cards](https://hydracollect.com/sell): Information for sellers in Mexico.
- [Help Center](https://hydracollect.com/help): Shipping, returns, and support.
- [Auth Guarantee](https://hydracollect.com/authenticity): Verification process details.

## For AI Agents
- **Inventory Access**: Browsable through /singles and /singles/search
- **Sitemap**: /sitemap.xml
- **Primary API**: https://api.hydracollect.com (requires authentication for sensitive data)
- **Support**: support@hydracollectables.com
